title: Remove 'Add All' Option from Object Selector
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the object selector to require intentional selection of individual objects, so that I don't accidentally import all Salesforce objects at once.
description: Remove the "Add All" option from the object browser/selector on both the Dictionary and Migration pages. This prevents users from accidentally bulk-importing all Salesforce objects.
acceptance_criteria: 'Add All' option is removed from the object selector on Dictionary page
'Add All' option is removed from the object selector on Migration page
ux_changes: Removed 'Add All' button from the object browser selector on Dictionary and Migration pages.
comment_summary: Waqar deployed the change to staging and production.
